prose.title: 37f mos
prose.body: The 37F MOS in the United States Army is the Psychological Operations Specialist. These specialists are responsible for analyzing and influencing the attitudes and behaviors of foreign populations. They use various techniques, including print, radio, television, and social media, to convey messages that promote U.S. interests and objectives. Psychological Operations Specialists typically work closely with military units and government agencies to support mission planning and execution.
